properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v3 v2 v5 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I lift up my eyes to the hills Where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, My help comes from the Lord, My help comes from the Lord, Maker of Heaven and earth.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A thousand may fall at my side Ten thousand at my right hand But my help comes from the Lord My help comes from the Lord, My help comes from the Lord, Maker of Heaven and earth

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He will not allow My foot to be moved He Who keeps me Will not slumber For the Lord Who made The heavens and earth Will be my strength forever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My help comes My help comes From the Lord My help comes My help comes My help comes From the Lord

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My help comes from the Lord My help comes from the Lord My help comes from the Lord Maker of Heaven and earth

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: My help comes My help comes My help comes From the Lord My help comes My help comes My help comes From the Lord
